hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs deploy compliance workflows in a secure private cloud environment with role-based access, audit trails, governance, and evidence integrity to support institutional trust and bank due diligence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit trail gaps slow enterprise readiness
problem_description: Without controlled deployment and consistent governance, compliance evidence and audit logs remain fragmented and less reliable. This hinders VASPs from meeting institutional trust requirements and complicates bank due diligence and regulatory review processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY supports VASPs by consolidating role-based access, audit logs, evidence retention and governance into a single controlled environment that strengthens audit readiness and institutional trust in private cloud compliance.
workflow_title: From deployment controls to evidence governance
workflow_description: SFTY moves private cloud deployment policies through role-based access, audit logs, case management and evidence preservation to support institutional compliance trust.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated access. Secure compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs a private cloud layer connecting role-based access, audit logs, evidence integrity and workflows for clear, defensible compliance and institutional trust.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected layer that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting workflows into structured cases, evidence and audit trails within regulated private cloud environments.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support private cloud deployment?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports private cloud deployment with role-based access, audit logs, data encryption and controlled governance to meet institutional security and compliance requirements in VASP operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence by recording decision logs, case history, provider outputs and supporting documentation in secure, auditable workflows suitable for regulatory inspection and bank due diligence.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect our current compliance stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into one compliance operating layer without disrupting your current stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, cases, decision records and reports to streamline compliance operations and enhance audit readiness.
final_title: Review private cloud compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports VASP role-based access, audit trails, evidence integrity and governance in private cloud deployments.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
